onboarding.workspace.title: Create your workspace
onboarding.workspace.body: A workspace is your tenant boundary — every project, document, and audit log is scoped to it.
onboarding.project.title: Provision your first project
onboarding.project.body: Projects host RAG collections + Cerbos policies. We auto-allocate a Qdrant collection and hook the cascade router.
onboarding.invite.title: Invite teammates
onboarding.invite.body: Email-only — each invitee gets an OAuth 2.1 client with a starter role. Cerbos policies stay in version control.
onboarding.rag-ingest.title: Ingest your first document
onboarding.rag-ingest.body: Drop a PDF, Markdown, or paste a URL. We chunk + embed with BGE-M3 and write to your project's Qdrant collection.
onboarding.rag-query.title: Run a grounded query
onboarding.rag-query.body: Ask anything against your ingested doc. The cascade routes to the cheapest provider that meets your faithfulness budget; citations are returned alongside the answer.
contact.title: Pilot / PoC Conversation
contact.subtitle: Get in touch to try the system in your own environment.
header.lang.label: Language
hero.title: 100+ MCP tools and 6-provider cascade on your own server.
hero.subtitle: Automatia ABS: automate the chaos — on your own server. 100+ MCP tools, 6-provider cascade, quality pipelines. Bring your Anthropic key, your data stays on your VPS.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataController.body: The data controller for this website and the Automatia ABS product is Automatia BCN. Contact: Barcelona, Spain; privacy@automatiabcn.com.
privacy.dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
privacy.dataCollected.body: Because ABS runs on your own server, your AI prompts and code are processed only on your infrastructure; Automatia BCN cannot access them.
privacy.dataCollected.email: Email address — at purchase and waitlist signup.
privacy.dataCollected.payment: Payment data — card details are processed by Stripe and never reach Automatia BCN servers. We store the Stripe customer_id and invoice reference only.
privacy.dataCollected.license: License activation metadata — JTI, install date, seat count.
privacy.dataCollected.logs: Server access logs — IP, user-agent, request path; retained 30 days for security purposes.
privacy.purpose.title: Processing Purpose and Legal Basis
privacy.purpose.body: We process data to issue licenses, prepare invoices, provide support, and ensure security. Legal basis: GDPR Art. 6(1)(b) — contract performance, and Art. 6(1)(f) — legitimate interest (security, fraud prevention).
privacy.processors.title: Third-Party Processors
privacy.processors.stripe: Stripe Payments Europe Ltd. (Ireland) — payments, refunds, subscriptions. PCI-DSS Level 1.
privacy.processors.anthropic: Anthropic (Claude API) — invoked only by your server; Automatia BCN is not a relay.
privacy.processors.hetzner: Hetzner Online GmbH (Germany) — server hosting, GDPR-compliant DPA.
privacy.retention.title: Data Retention Period
privacy.retention.body: License and billing data are retained for the active license period plus 12 months (legal accounting obligation). Access logs are anonymised or deleted after 30 days. Following a refund, all personal data is deleted within an additional 30 days at the customer's request.
privacy.rights.title: Your User Rights (GDPR Art. 15-22)
privacy.rights.access: Right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing.
privacy.rights.objection: Right to object; you may object to processing for marketing purposes at any time.
privacy.rights.complain: Right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority — Spain: AEPD (aepd.es).
privacy.exercise.title: How to Exercise Your Rights (Self-Service)
privacy.exercise.intro: With your license Bearer token you can call the following endpoints:
privacy.exercise.export: Data export (Art. 15): POST /v1/me/data-export — returns an encrypted ZIP (24h download link).
privacy.exercise.delete: Account deletion (Art. 17): POST /v1/me/account/delete-request → POST /v1/me/account/delete-confirm. Automatic purge after 30-day grace period.
privacy.subprocessors.title: Sub-processors and Data Processing Agreement
privacy.subprocessors.body: The current sub-processor list is in docs/legal/subprocessors.md; the DPA template for B2B customers is in docs/legal/dpa-template.md.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.body: For rights requests, contact privacy@automatiabcn.com. Requests are answered within 30 days after identity verification (free of charge).
deletion.title: Account deletion status
deletion.none: No deletion request is currently pending for this account.
deletion.scheduled.title: Your account is scheduled for deletion
deletion.scheduled.body: Your data will be permanently purged on {date}. You have {days} days left to cancel.
deletion.purged.title: Account already purged
deletion.purged.body: The personal data on this account was purged on {date}.
